title: Chirala Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Chirala with a Z-Score of +3.14. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Chirala has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature is accompanied by high humidity of 85% and moderate wind speed of 6.5 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.0 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
